title: BR-002A execution: store-path proof packet + align scope docs (docs-only)
intent: Execute the BR-002A archaeology Dev Order (read-only) and deliver BR-002A_PROOF.md, answering all seven contract-proof questions with cited evidence: the dispatch resolves store.list_runs_filtered as a re-export of store_api.py:200 (the TypeError raise-site) delegating to store.py:294 then store_filter.matches_index_meta; matches_index_meta has only 2 internal callers (contained blast radius); tool_kind is an established index_meta field (batch_tree already filters on it); batch_label must land in payload (query_*_by_label readers); BR-004 is a list_runs_filtered bug that dedups into BR-002. Fold the resulting corrections into the ledger, defect register, and next-candidate so the scope docs match the proof, and mark BR-002B ready pending owner authorization. No production code changed.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Adds the BR-002A proof packet and aligns the ledger/defect-register/next-candidate/queue to its findings. No source, schema, route, or test file touched.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: The proof packet is the archaeology deliverable that unblocks (or re-scopes) BR-002B; the doc alignments remove a live proof-vs-ledger contradiction (store_api.py:200 raise-site, contained blast radius, BR-004 dedup).
